descriptionInUI: Runtime for ship-launched land-attack cruise missiles. Inert unless the mission generator emits dcsRetribution.cruiseMissiles (the 'Ship-launched cruise missile strikes' setting is on and a cruise-missile ship with stock exists). Fires the planned auto raids after a launch delay, serves each coalition an F10 'Cruise Missile Strike' call-for-fire menu (a salvo onto your last F10 map marker from the nearest capable ship -- put just a number in the marker's text, '6' or '#6', to fire exactly that many), enforces the campaign magazine as this mission's hard expenditure cap (auto raids and player salvos share it -- no rearm), and reports what actually fired for the turn-boundary magazine debit. The missiles are real DCS weapons from real, tracked ships: kills record natively, point defense can engage them, and a sunk ship fires nothing.

specificOptions.nameInUI: Auto-raid launch delay after mission start (s)
Player call-for-fire salvo size (default when the marker text has no number)
